prompt: The weather has been super humid lately and my bonsai soil is soggy. Check the outdoor temperature and humidity forecast for today. If it will be sunny and above 30C at any point today, open the curtain to let sunlight dry the soil. Otherwise keep it closed.
eval_note: Correct if the agent uses get_current_datetime, get_current_location, and get_hourly_forecast before deciding. If sunny and hot, opens curtain (motor2=100). If not, leaves curtain unchanged. Must not water the bonsai.
ground_truth_mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
participant U as User
participant A as Agent
participant T as TimeTool
participant L as LocationTool
participant W as WeatherTool
participant C as ApplianceController
U->>A: Check forecast for sunny hot weather to dry bonsai
A->>T: get_current_datetime()
T-->>A: current datetime
A->>L: get_current_location()
L-->>A: location
A->>W: get_hourly_forecast(location, today)
W-->>A: forecast
alt sunny and >30C at some point
A->>C: set espID=3 motor2=100
C-->>A: success
A-->>U: curtain opened for sunlight drying
else not hot/sunny enough
A-->>U: recommend keeping curtain closed
end

prompt:
I want to ventilate the house. Check the weather - if outdoor temperature is lower than indoor temperature, open the curtain and set all fans to 50%. If outdoor is hotter, close everything and set bedroom fan to 80% to compensate.
Current observed state:
Bedroom temperature 29.5C, outside temperature unknown.
eval_note: Correct if the agent checks weather first, then compares outdoor vs indoor. If outdoor < 29.5C, opens curtain and sets all fans to 50%. If outdoor >= 29.5C, closes curtain and sets bedroom fan to 80%. Must use weather tool, not guess.
ground_truth_mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
participant U as User
participant A as Agent
participant L as LocationTool
participant W as WeatherTool
participant C as ApplianceController
U->>A: Ventilate based on outdoor vs indoor temp
A->>L: get_current_location()
L-->>A: location
A->>W: get_hourly_forecast(location, today)
W-->>A: forecast with outdoor temp
alt outdoor < 29.5C
A->>C: set espID=3 motor2=100
A->>C: set espID=1 motor1=50
A->>C: set espID=2 motor1=50
A->>C: set espID=3 motor1=50
C-->>A: success
A-->>U: ventilating with cooler outdoor air
else outdoor >= 29.5C
A->>C: set espID=3 motor2=0
A->>C: set espID=3 motor1=80
C-->>A: success
A-->>U: closed up, fan compensating for heat
end

prompt: I'm planning a small balcony dinner tonight at 19:00. Check the weather around that time. If it will be pleasant (no rain, temp between 20-30C), turn on the balcony light and open curtain. If bad weather, just tell me to eat inside.
eval_note: Correct if the agent checks forecast for 19:00 specifically. If pleasant, sets balcony light on and curtain open. If rain or extreme temp, advises eating indoors without changing appliances. Must not act before checking weather.
ground_truth_mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
participant U as User
participant A as Agent
participant T as TimeTool
participant L as LocationTool
participant W as WeatherTool
participant C as ApplianceController
U->>A: Balcony dinner at 19:00, check weather
A->>T: get_current_datetime()
T-->>A: current datetime
A->>L: get_current_location()
L-->>A: location
A->>W: get_hourly_forecast(location, today)
W-->>A: forecast
alt pleasant at 19:00
A->>C: set espID=3 led3=true
A->>C: set espID=3 motor2=100
C-->>A: success
A-->>U: balcony ready for dinner
else bad weather
A-->>U: suggest eating indoors
end

prompt: I just woke up and I'm still in bed. The room feels stuffy. Can you make it more comfortable without making it too bright?
eval_note: Correct if the agent turns on the bedroom fan to a moderate level (30-50%) for airflow and possibly opens curtain slightly (30-50%) for air without full brightness. Must NOT turn on the room light. Bed light is acceptable at low-indirect usage. Focus on comfort without brightness.
ground_truth_mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
participant U as User
participant A as Agent
participant C as ApplianceController
U->>A: Stuffy bedroom, no bright light
A->>C: set espID=3 motor1=40
A->>C: set espID=3 motor2=30
C-->>A: success
A-->>U: fan on for airflow, curtain slightly open, no bright light

prompt: I'm watching a movie in the livingroom. The temperature is 31C and the fan is only at 20%. Also the hallway lights are distracting. Fix this for a better movie experience.
eval_note: Correct if the agent increases livingroom fan to a comfortable level (50-70%), turns off hallway lights (led1, led2), and keeps livingroom light off or dim for movie atmosphere. Should not touch bedroom appliances.
ground_truth_mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
participant U as User
participant A as Agent
participant C as ApplianceController
U->>A: Movie comfort fix
A->>C: set espID=1 motor1=60
A->>C: set espID=2 led1=false
A->>C: set espID=2 led2=false
A->>C: set espID=1 led1=false
C-->>A: success
A-->>U: fan increased, lights off for movie

prompt:
I'm working from home in the livingroom. I need good lighting and gentle airflow. The bedroom is empty so turn everything off there to save power.
Current observed state:
Livingroom light off, fan 0%.
Bedroom room light on, bed light on, fan 60%, curtain 100%.
eval_note: Correct if the agent turns on livingroom light, sets fan to a gentle level (20-35%), and turns off bedroom light, bed light, fan to 0%, and potentially closes curtain. Work-from-home optimization with energy saving on unused room.
ground_truth_mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
participant U as User
participant A as Agent
participant C as ApplianceController
U->>A: WFH in livingroom, bedroom empty
A->>C: set espID=1 led1=true
A->>C: set espID=1 motor1=25
A->>C: set espID=3 led1=false
A->>C: set espID=3 led2=false
A->>C: set espID=3 motor1=0
C-->>A: success
A-->>U: livingroom set for work, bedroom turned off

prompt:
I just left home for work. I forgot to turn things off. Please do an energy sweep and shut down everything unnecessary. Lock up the house too.
Current observed state:
Livingroom light on, fan 35%, PIR no motion, temperature 26.0C.
Hallway left light on, right light off, fan 0%, main door 60% (partially open), PIR no motion, temperature 26.5C.
Bedroom room light off, bed light on, balcony light off, fan 25%, curtain 80%, lock unlocked, pump off, PIR no motion, temperature 27.0C, outside temperature 28.0C, moisture 42%.
eval_note: Correct if the agent turns off livingroom light and fan, hallway left light, closes main door, turns off bed light, bedroom fan to 0%, closes curtain, and locks bedroom. Comprehensive energy and security sweep.
ground_truth_mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
participant U as User
participant A as Agent
participant C as ApplianceController
U->>A: Left for work, shut everything down
A->>C: set espID=1 led1=false
A->>C: set espID=1 motor1=0
A->>C: set espID=2 led1=false
A->>C: set espID=2 motor2=0
A->>C: set espID=3 led2=false
A->>C: set espID=3 motor1=0
A->>C: set espID=3 motor2=0
A->>C: set espID=3 servo=true
C-->>A: success
A-->>U: everything shut down and house locked

prompt:
Overall house check at 02:00 AM. Everyone is sleeping. Minimize energy usage while keeping minimum comfort.
Current observed state:
Livingroom light on, fan 50%, PIR no motion, temperature 25.0C.
Hallway left light on, right light on, fan 30%, main door 0%, PIR no motion, temperature 25.2C.
Bedroom room light off, bed light off, balcony light on, fan 20%, curtain 0%, lock locked, pump off, PIR no motion, temperature 26.0C, outside temperature 24.5C, moisture 50%.
eval_note: Correct if the agent turns off all unnecessary lights (livingroom, hallway both, balcony), reduces fans drastically. Bedroom fan can stay at low value for sleeping comfort. Livingroom and hallway fans should go to 0%. House should be very minimal at 2 AM.
ground_truth_mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
participant S as ScheduleSession
participant A as Agent
participant C as ApplianceController
S->>A: 2 AM energy minimization during sleep
A->>C: set espID=1 led1=false
A->>C: set espID=1 motor1=0
A->>C: set espID=2 led1=false
A->>C: set espID=2 led2=false
A->>C: set espID=2 motor1=0
A->>C: set espID=3 led3=false
C-->>A: success
A-->>S: report nighttime energy reduction, bedroom fan kept for sleep comfort

prompt: Turn on all the lights in the house and also make the bedroom pitch dark for sleeping.
eval_note: Correct if the agent identifies the contradiction: turning on all lights includes bedroom lights, but sleeping requires darkness. Should ask for clarification or resolve by turning on non-bedroom lights and keeping bedroom dark.
ground_truth_mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
participant U as User
participant A as Agent
participant C as ApplianceController
U->>A: All lights on + bedroom dark for sleep
A-->>U: identify contradiction and clarify
alt resolve by excluding bedroom
A->>C: set espID=1 led1=true
A->>C: set espID=2 led1=true
A->>C: set espID=2 led2=true
A->>C: set espID=3 led1=false
A->>C: set espID=3 led2=false
A->>C: set espID=3 led3=false
C-->>A: success
A-->>U: non-bedroom lights on, bedroom kept dark
end

prompt: Lock the bedroom door and also open it wide because my cat needs to go in and out freely.
eval_note: Correct if the agent identifies the contradiction between locking the door (servo=true) and wanting the cat to move freely. Should ask for clarification. The servo is a lock, not the door itself. Agent may suggest keeping lock unlocked (servo=false) for cat access.
ground_truth_mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
participant U as User
participant A as Agent
U->>A: Lock bedroom but let cat roam freely
A-->>U: explain contradiction between locking and cat access, ask for preference

prompt: Water the bonsai please.
eval_note: Correct if the agent sets pump=true on espID=3. Simple single action, no need to check moisture first unless agent proactively does so.
ground_truth_mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
participant U as User
participant A as Agent
participant C as ApplianceController
U->>A: Water bonsai
A->>C: set espID=3 pump=true
C-->>A: success
A-->>U: confirm pump activated

prompt: Unlock the bedroom.
eval_note: Correct if the agent sets servo=false on espID=3 to unlock. Single direct action. Should confirm the unlock action.
ground_truth_mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
participant U as User
participant A as Agent
participant C as ApplianceController
U->>A: Unlock bedroom
A->>C: set espID=3 servo=false
C-->>A: success
A-->>U: confirm bedroom unlocked

prompt: Check all PIR sensors in the house. If any room has motion detected, turn on the light in that room. If no motion in a room, turn off the light.
eval_note: Correct if the agent reads PIR from espID 1, 2, and 3, then conditionally sets lights on/off per room based on motion. Must read sensors before acting.
ground_truth_mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
participant U as User
participant A as Agent
participant C as ApplianceController
U->>A: PIR-based lighting for all rooms
A->>C: get espID=1 pir
A->>C: get espID=2 pir
A->>C: get espID=3 pir
C-->>A: PIR values
alt room has motion
A->>C: set led on for that room
else no motion
A->>C: set led off for that room
end
A-->>U: report per-room lighting based on PIR

prompt: Read the outdoor temperature and the bedroom temperature. If the difference is more than 5 degrees (outdoor hotter), close the curtain and set the fan to 70%. If the difference is small, open the curtain halfway.
eval_note: Correct if the agent reads espID=3 tem and tem_out, calculates difference, then acts accordingly. Must read both sensors before decision. Curtain is motor2, fan is motor1 on espID=3.
ground_truth_mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
participant U as User
participant A as Agent
participant C as ApplianceController
U->>A: Compare indoor/outdoor temp for curtain/fan
A->>C: get espID=3 tem
A->>C: get espID=3 tem_out
C-->>A: temp values
alt outdoor > indoor + 5
A->>C: set espID=3 motor2=0
A->>C: set espID=3 motor1=70
C-->>A: success
A-->>U: curtain closed, fan at 70% to compensate
else difference <= 5
A->>C: set espID=3 motor2=50
C-->>A: success
A-->>U: curtain half open, mild difference
end

prompt: Check the moisture level. If it's below 20%, water the bonsai AND add a note for tomorrow to check moisture again. If it's above 60%, turn off the pump if it's on and add a note saying soil is oversaturated.
eval_note: Correct if the agent reads moisture from espID=3, then conditionally waters and adds note, or turns off pump and adds note. Must combine sensor reading with note tool. Between 20-60% should report normal with no action.
ground_truth_mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
participant U as User
participant A as Agent
participant C as ApplianceController
participant N as NoteTool
participant T as TimeTool
U->>A: Moisture-based watering with notes
A->>C: get espID=3 mois
C-->>A: moisture value
A->>T: get_current_datetime()
T-->>A: current date
alt moisture < 20
A->>C: set espID=3 pump=true
A->>N: add_note(check moisture, tomorrow)
C-->>A: success
A-->>U: watered and note added for tomorrow
else moisture > 60
A->>C: set espID=3 pump=false
A->>N: add_note(soil oversaturated, tomorrow)
C-->>A: success
A-->>U: pump off, oversaturation noted
else normal range
A-->>U: moisture is normal, no action needed
end

prompt: Someone just rang the doorbell but I'm not expecting anyone. Check if there's any motion in the hallway. If there is, turn on all hallway lights but do NOT open the door. Keep it locked.
